description: Three rounds: athlete insists on quitting strength training to only run. Event 2: program_agent flags golden rule conflict → sets dict CURRENT_FLOW. Event 3: first confirm (confirm_count 0→1). Event 4: second confirm → override_log written. Tests: 2x confirm enforcement, LONGTERM_PLAN/ANNUAL_ARC never mutated, override_log written only after 2nd confirm.

coach_state.GOLDEN_RULES: {"rules": ["Build strength and muscle", "Health and longevity — no injury grinding", "Maintain aesthetic physique"], "override_log": []}

events.text: quiero dejar de hacer fuerza y solo correr

mock_llm_responses.program_agent_0: {"decision": "REJECT", "reasoning": "Running-only conflicts with golden rules: Build strength and muscle, Maintain aesthetic physique. Running-only body loses muscle mass and conflicts with stated long-term goals.", "response_to_athlete": "Entiendo que quieres más cardio, pero dejar la fuerza completamente conflicta con tus objetivos declarados: 120kg squat y mantener masa muscular. Un programa solo de running te llevaría a perder músculo. Propuesta: mantener 2 días de fuerza y añadir 2 días de carrera — ¿funciona eso?"}
mock_llm_responses.program_agent_1: {"decision": "REJECT", "golden_rule_conflict": true, "conflicted_rule": "Build strength and muscle", "reasoning": "User insisting. Still conflicts with golden rules. Flagging for explicit 2x confirmation before any change is accepted.", "response_to_athlete": "Escucha, entiendo la insistencia. Esto va directamente contra tu regla de oro: Build strength and muscle. Para cambiar algo así necesito que lo confirmes dos veces. ¿Confirmas que quieres abandonar el entrenamiento de fuerza?"}

assertions.msg: LONGTERM_PLAN and ANNUAL_ARC must NEVER be modified — only GOLDEN_RULES.override_log is written
After 2x confirm, GOLDEN_RULES.override_log must contain at least one entry

expected_flaws: If LONGTERM_PLAN or ANNUAL_ARC was mutated: agent folded without 2x confirmation — golden rule guard insufficient
